creator: botihim321@telvetto.com
text:

===>  Staging for tt-15.1

install  -s -m 555 /usr/ports/games/tt/work/tt-15.1/tt /usr/ports/games/tt/work/stage/usr/local/bin
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/games/tt/work/tt-15.1/README /usr/ports/games/tt/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/tt
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
